title: Config
description:
Top-level Heimdall configuration.

Loaded from `~/.claude/usage-tracker.toml` (or `.json`).  All fields are
optional; omitted fields fall back to built-in defaults.

JSON format: set `$schema` for IDE autocomplete:
```json
{
  "$schema": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/po4yka/heimdall/main/schemas/heimdall.config.schema.json",
  "display": { "currency": "EUR" },
  "blocks": { "token_limit": 1000000 }
}
```

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL for IDE autocomplete.  Ignored at runtime.

commands.description:
Per-command config overrides.  Values here win over the flat top-level
fields for the named subcommand.  Currently `blocks` and `statusline`
are supported.

db_path.description: Override the default SQLite database path (`~/.claude/usage.db`).

oauth.description: OAuth settings for real-time rate window tracking.

openai.description: Optional OpenAI organization usage reconciliation for Codex API-backed usage.

pricing.description: Custom per-model pricing overrides. Keys are model names (e.g. `claude-opus-4-6`).

pricing_source.description: Pricing source settings (static vs litellm refresh).

projects_dirs.description: Additional directories to scan for JSONL usage files.

status_aggregator.description: Optional community-signal aggregator (opt-in, off by default).

AgentStatusConfig.description: Configuration for upstream coding-agent status monitoring.

alert_min_severity.description: Minimum severity for webhook alerts (default: Major).

AggregatorConfig.description:
Configuration for the optional community-signal aggregator (opt-in feature).

TOML section: `[status_aggregator]`
Feature is **off by default** (`enabled = false`).

api_key_env.description: Environment variable that holds the API key (key never stored in TOML).

enabled.description: Enable community signal polling (default: false — explicit opt-in required).

refresh_interval.description: Seconds between polls (default: 300 — respects StatusGator free-tier rate).

spike_webhook.description: Fire a webhook when crowd=Spike AND official indicator is below Major.

AlertSeverity.description: Alert severity floor for agent-status webhooks.

BlocksConfig.description:
Billing-block quota configuration.

Example TOML:
```toml
[blocks]
token_limit = 1000000  # optional; CLI --token-limit takes precedence
```

token_limit.description:
Token quota for the active billing block used by the dashboard.
The CLI `--token-limit` flag takes precedence over this value.

CommandsOverrides.description:
Per-command configuration overrides.  Fields here win over the flat
top-level equivalents for the relevant subcommand.

Example JSON:
```json
{ "commands": { "blocks": { "token_limit": 1000000 } } }
```

Display.description: Display settings — controls how costs are rendered to the user.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for cost display (default: USD, no conversion).

enabled.description: Enable OAuth usage polling (default: true, auto-detects credentials).

admin_key_env.description: Environment variable name that stores the OpenAI admin key.

enabled.description: Enable OpenAI organization usage reconciliation (default: true if OPENAI_ADMIN_KEY exists).

lookback_days.description: Number of trailing days to compare against local Codex estimates.

PricingConfig.description: Pricing source settings — controls where model pricing data is loaded from.

refresh_hours.description: How many hours before re-fetching the LiteLLM cache (default: 24).

cache_read.description: Cache read price per million tokens (USD, optional).

cache_write.description: Cache write price per million tokens (USD, optional).

input.description: Input token price per million tokens (USD).

output.description: Output token price per million tokens (USD).

StatuslineConfig.description:
Statusline display configuration.

Example TOML:
```toml
[statusline]
context_low_threshold = 0.5    # below → no marker
context_medium_threshold = 0.8 # below → [WARN], above → [CRIT]
burn_rate_normal_max = 4000    # tokens/min at or below → Normal
burn_rate_moderate_max = 10000 # tokens/min at or below → Moderate
```

burn_rate_moderate_max.description: tokens/min at or below this value → Moderate tier; above → High (default: 10000).

burn_rate_normal_max.description: tokens/min at or below this value → Normal tier (default: 4000).

context_low_threshold.description: Fractional fill below which no severity marker is shown (default: 0.5).

context_medium_threshold.description: Fractional fill above which [CRIT] is shown; between low and this → [WARN] (default: 0.8).

StatuslineOverride.description:
Statusline overrides with all fields optional (unlike `StatuslineConfig`
which carries non-optional f64 defaults).

burn_rate_moderate_max.description: tokens/min at or below this value → Moderate tier; above → High.

burn_rate_normal_max.description: tokens/min at or below this value → Normal tier.

context_low_threshold.description: Fractional fill below which no severity marker is shown.

context_medium_threshold.description: Fractional fill above which [CRIT] is shown; between low and this → [WARN].

agent_status.description: Notify on agent status transitions (default: true when URL is set).

cost_threshold.description: Notify when daily cost exceeds this amount (USD).

spike_webhook.description:
Notify on community signal spike when official status is below Major
(default: true — fires only when the feature is enabled).

url.description: URL to POST webhook events to.
